nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Write down these words, for in accordance with these words I have made a covenant with you and with Israel.”

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses, “Write these words, for in accordance with these words I have made a covenant with you and with Israel.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要把這些話寫上，因為我是按著這些話與你和以色列人立約的。”

ccb.text: 耶和华又对摩西说：“你要把我说的这些话记录下来，因为我要按这些话跟你和以色列人立约。”
